articles.title: Champions League: Real Madrid and Man City go again, PSG hosts Chelsea
articles.original_title: Champions League: Real Madrid and Man City go again, PSG hosts Chelsea
articles.summary: Real Madrid and Manchester City go at it again in the Champions League on Wednesday.  For the fifth season in a row, the rivals have been drawn against each other in European club soccer's biggest competition.  City won 2-1 on that occasion but goes into the latest encounter knowing it has been eliminated by Madrid in each of the last two seasons.
